title: Earthy Greek Scamorza Revithia
description: A nutty, crumbly, brunch-mood Greek dish featuring vegan scamorza poached in tomatoes and baked in a terracotta dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200C and lightly oil a terracotta baking dish.
Slice the tomatoes in half and place cut sides down in the dish.
Add the sliced onion, whole garlic cloves, and olive oil over the tomatoes.
Poach the tomatoes and vegetables over medium heat for 5 minutes until the tops soften.
Drizzle sea salt, black pepper, and oregano over the mixture.
Slice the vegan scamorza into thick wedges and arrange on top of the poached mixture.
Bake for 15 minutes until the cheese is golden and the tomatoes burst.
Remove from oven and sprinkle chopped parsley and lemon zest before serving.
